evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2200);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(3500);let out={};try{const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');out.infraLen=c?c.innerHTML.length:-1;out.zonas=c?c.querySelectorAll('[class*="zona"],.card').length:-1;out.archBtn=!!(c&&/Archivados/.test(c.textContent||''));out.heatmap=/Heatmap/.test(document.body.textContent||'');}catch(e){out.err=String(e)}window.scrollTo(0,0);out.ov=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1;return out;})()
